ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the demographic group (e.g., 0-17, 18-44) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the demographic group (e.g., Male, Female, Non-binary) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the demographic group (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the demographic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the demographic group */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the population data was recorded */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the demographic group */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the demographic group */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the demographic group */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the population data (e.g., government agency, research institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES demographic_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case data entry */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total COVID-19 cases in the demographic group */,
  "cases_per_10k" REAL /* Cases per 10,000 individuals in the demographic group */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the case data was recorded */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the demographic group */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the demographic group */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the demographic group */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the case data */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the demographic group (e.g., Fully Vaccinated, Partially Vaccinated, Not Vaccinated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES demographic_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_data" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization data entry */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group */,
  "hospitalized" INTEGER /* Number of individuals hospitalized in the demographic group */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Hospitalization rate in the demographic group */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the hospitalization data was recorded */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the demographic group */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the demographic group */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the demographic group */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the hospitalization data */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES demographic_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "death_data" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death data entry */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in the demographic group */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate in the demographic group */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the death data was recorded */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the demographic group */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the demographic group */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the demographic group */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the death data */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_data_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES demographic_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES demographic_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
